examples: Fish is already tender and moist, so a marinade is just added for flavour.
Most sauerbraten recipes include both vinegar and wine in the marinade.
Clean shrimps, drain and mix with marinade for 15 minutes.
For pork, baby back ribs take up marinade very well and cook in an instant.
Add the pork loin to the bowl or dish and coat thoroughly in the marinade.
